basic_details.job_title: ECHS Medical Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical Specialist Notification 2026 has been released on 24 May 2026 on the official website www.echs.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ECHS Medical Specialist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/ MS in Specialty concerned/DNB with minimum 03 years work experience after post graduation
qualification.details: MD/MS in Specialty concerned/DNB. Minimum 03 years work experience in the subject concerned after post graduation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Medical Specialist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Medical Specialist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the ECHS Medical Specialist recruitment is 05 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Medical Specialist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Medical Specialist post will receive a salary of Rs. 1,30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Medical Specialist position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD/MS in the concerned specialty or DNB, along with a minimum of 03 years of work experience after post-graduation.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Specialist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Specialist post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the ECHS Medical Specialist role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ECHS Medical Specialist post located?
faq.answer: The ECHS Medical Specialist post is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of ECHS?
faq.answer: The official website of Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) is www.echs.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview date for the Medical Specialist position?
faq.answer: The interview date for the Medical Specialist position is scheduled for 10 June 2026.
